_doc: Optional per-developer overrides loaded from cwd by packages/engine/src/config/models.ts.
Copy this file to dev-config.json (gitignored) and trim to only the fields you want to override.
Per-tier provider/model assignment is not configured here — it lives in connections.json,
managed via the Connections UI. Only `effort` and `pricing` are read by the loader.

effort._doc: Per-agent reasoning effort. Keys are agent names; values are 'low' | 'medium' | 'high' | 'max' | null. The 'default' key is the fallback for unconfigured agents. Production defaults are inlined in models.ts DEFAULTS.effort; entries here override them.

pricing._doc: Per-model price overrides keyed by model ID. Useful for adjusting cost calculations during testing without redeploying. Values are USD per 1M tokens.
